text.content: Four fixes vs v1: (1) Data-source read method — STEP 1 (dashboard) + STEP 4 (v0 log count) enumerate via notion-search on the data_source_url + fetch rows + filter Status in reading; STEP 1 aborts only on a genuine search ERROR (removes a false 'dashboard unreachable → abort' path). (2) Write-back safety net — every write confirms it landed + WRITE-FALLBACK preserves content in the run summary on failure (v0 Calibration Log creates, Synthesis Log summary, dashboard updates). (3) Greek/gamma {result} envelope — Dealer Gamma + UW pulls unwrap the UW MCP {result:[...]} envelope; empty result → 'gamma: no data', no fabricated regime. (4) enderverse-repo dependency made explicit (carries 13f_managers.json + scorers). Minor: STEP 4 Last Run uses expanded date format; Progress appended not overwritten.

text.content: Strategic re-orientation (operator-set 2026-06-01): the system is too risk-asymmetric — it surfaces risks/hedges/trims but has no equal-and-opposite OPPORTUNITY/lean-in surfacing. Make it an aggressive opportunity engine. Six strands: (1) Opportunity symmetry — surface lean-ins, not just risks (the ACT-NOW catalyst build is step 1; extend with opportunity lenses). (2) Conviction accumulation → sizing — signals aggregate into a conviction read that drives WHICH names + HOW HEAVY (see open question vs the 5/30 'no numeric score' decision). (3) UW options as opportunity radar — bullish call flow / OI build / dark-pool accumulation / sweeps / gamma setups FEED conviction, not just IV/risk context. (4) Individual-stock focus — route a large share of Fundstrat positive-selection (Top picks) through Off-Hours dossiers → accumulator → single-name positions; FS pre-registered + scored (verify, don't follow blindly — accumulation IS the no-blind-follow mechanism). (5) Critical-minerals individual stocks as a flagship theme — US national-security supply-chain securing, high-growth; find high-quality names + decide WHEN to go heavy; near-term China-driven volatility expected. Start from MP + Meridian coverage. (6) Research throughput — likely a 2nd Off-Hours worker to do the individual-stock research.

text.content: CONTINUITY: consistent with the 5/30 Conviction Engine — System Philosophy Revision (concept page 36fc5031-4bb6-818f-b737-efcd98423b2a). That doc designated critical-minerals as 'the first concrete instance of the Watch/Strike machine' — so strand (5) is the planned worked example, not new. OPEN DESIGN QUESTION (resolve in scoping): strand (2) 'aggregate signals → how heavy' vs the 5/30 decision that DELIBERATELY REJECTED a conviction SCORE with a numeric deploy threshold (as false precision), choosing conviction-DIRECTION (▲ rising / ▬ flat / ▼ falling) instead. Default resolution: wire the EXISTING rising-conviction-direction read to a proactive LEAN-IN / size-up surface (the opportunity mirror of the risk surfacing) — no new score — unless the operator consciously revisits the score. HONEST DESIGN PRINCIPLE: aim ALL new aggression at FINDING + SIZING INTO conviction; KEEP the execution-discipline rails (defined-risk on options, position-sizing math, the pre-trade gate) because per the operator's own root-cause (the past burns = over-leverage + bad options, NOT bad theses) those are exactly what makes aggression survivable; DROP the thesis/sleeve-level timidity. MONITOR-STANCE REFRAME: from blanket sleeve suppression (categorical cap) → conviction-gated + execution-disciplined (a burned-sleeve name can size up when rising-conviction + UW opportunity signals + defined-risk execution clear it). FRAMEWORK-LEVEL → needs its own careful build + Four-Lens + Model Council (the 5/30 doc already flagged Model Council for this philosophy-level revision). Do NOT fold into the finished Surfacing-fix build (ships as-is). Near-term separable workstream: critical-minerals individual-stock research sweep + the 2nd Off-Hours worker.

text.content: Confirmed in 6/1 Fresh Run. Every Morning Scan Signal Log row carries Status='Open' AND a separate Triage Outcome ('Top 3' / 'Logged'). text.content: macro_freshness (session_orchestrator) requires snapshot_date >= current trading day (operator's explicit strict design). But UW's freshest curve lags: 5/28 on a 6/1 session, with ETF closes at 5/29. So an honestly-dated production cache reads STALE every day the feed lags 1-3 days. Decide: (a) the macro routine stamps 'today' (overstates currency, but clears the guard), or (b) loosen the guard to accept the most-recent-available curve (age <= ~1-2 trading days). Validation stamped today to prove the stale-clear mechanism works.

text.content: , 41 endpoints, separate Bearer token) is a more capable surface than the UW MCP connector the design (Pieces A/B/C) was built around. Three upgrades worth wiring: (1) /api/search + /api/search/users — TEXT SEARCH, which kills the documented no-search weakness (Operational_Reference L237 slug-matching); makes Piece B discovery + Piece C disconfirmation reliable. HIGHEST value/effort ratio. (2) user-level + whale endpoints (/api/users/{addr}, /score-history, /traders/whales, /traders/smart-users) are NO LONGER account-gated on REST (they return Unauthorized/HashDive-gated on MCP) — unlocks a thin whale->P-MACRO-CONTEXT geopolitical-risk read (Image 3 whales are all Iran/Taiwan/China geopolitics). (3) /api/watchlists CRUD — define the ~15-market catalyst/policy/geopolitical slice ONCE, watch only that (P-SIMPLICITY-correct; never the firehose). SKIP the WebSocket live-fill stream — real-time infra, no payoff for a swing/position trader; polling the watchlist in Morning Scan is enough.

text.content: CONSTRAINT: REST needs a Bearer header per call -> NOT callable from interactive chat (no auth headers; token shouldn't live in tool calls). It belongs in the CLOUD ROUTINES (Claude Code can authenticate). In-chat stays on the MCP connector (5 working prediction tools). So this is a ROUTING change, not a CI/principle change. CONNECTION: under v11.36 #MONITOR-STANCE, crypto/nuclear/minerals are hold-and-watch-for-re-entry — a decisive crypto-regulation market move (CLARITY, stablecoin bill) is exactly a 'high-confidence catalyst / regime-turn' re-entry condition. So the right home is a re-entry-gate / watch surface on MONITOR sleeves, not a trade-finder. Bucket ranking for the book: insiders = keep narrow (disconfirmation engine, sharpest on crypto-regulation); whales = small new macro-only read; smart-money = low priority (only smart_gap is useful). 6/28 Piece-C decision inherits this better tooling. STAGED BUILD (operator to pick scope a/b/c): a=swap cloud-routine discovery to REST /search + seed curated watchlist; b=+whale->macro line; c=+Council prompt. NOTE (5/28): operator confirms HashDive REST endpoints are accessible NOW for confirm/disconfirm use — access is token-dependent and may not be permanent ('at least for now'). Operator to feed remaining endpoints; before committing a design confirm /api/search response shape + whether /api/assets/{id}/ohlc gives clean probability history.

text.content: The manual classify-each-call step is the throughput bottleneck that let a week of Farrell 'Crypto - Comments' notes (5/20-5/26) plus Lee macro notes pile up un-ingested, causing the 5/28 false-negative (Issue #10). Proposed: a batch-classify helper that proposes tier + falsification condition + scoring window for a batch of Inbox notes in one pass, with the operator still approving each tier individually -- no auto-write, preserving the P-SOURCE-CALIBRATION no-retrofitting / no-selection-bias hard rules. Pairs with the v11.35 classification-precedes-calibration ordering (makes the now-mandatory pre-calibration classification step fast enough to actually run every session).

text.content: , weekdays ~8am ET) to include a 'Pilots' stanza at a defined section position. The stanza reads from the Pilot Status page (Part 1) and surfaces, for each active pilot, 1–3 lines based on fresh data: · v0 / Insider clusters — any new BULLISH cluster from insider_activity_scan in the trailing 24h on a non-held, in-universe ticker; format 'v0: N new cluster(s) yesterday — TICKER (X-band)' or 'v0: nothing yesterday'. · Dealer Gamma Overlay — current SPY (default) regime + flip level; format 'Gamma: [🟢/⚪/🔴] [regime], flip ~$XXXX'. · 13F Best-Ideas — nothing daily; fires only in Part 3's Weekly Run during 13F filing windows. · RSM — not surfaced (PROTOTYPE, unshipped). Pilots with no signal output one line ('nothing today') so existence stays visible — this is the anti-forgetting mechanism. Routine writes Last Run Date back to the Pilot Status page for any pilot that fires. Edits land in BOTH the Claude Code cloud-routine config AND the setup .md doc so manual and automated runs stay in sync.
